Title: CommPlex Phase 0 — Launch & Operations
Description: Master project for getting CommPlex live and the team onboarded. Covers infrastructure, calling operations, vehicle asset liquidation, and team dev environment setup.

Title: [EPIC] Infrastructure & GCP Security
Description: All foundational GCP, IAM, and GitHub infrastructure. Blocker for everything else.

Title: [EPIC] CommPlex Calling Operations — Live Today
Description: Get wave and serial calling live on production Twilio number +1-866-736-2349. This is the top priority deliverable.

Title: [EPIC] Team Dev Environment Onboarding
Description: Get all 3 active team members (Kenyon/Cynthia/Charles) set up with Codespaces, GCP access, and verified local tooling.

Title: [EPIC] Vehicle Asset Liquidation Tracker
Description: Track and execute liquidation of MKZ, TownCar, F350, Jayco, and Ford Edge. Capital generation for S2S runway.

Title: [EPIC] CommPlexEdge — Dashboard & Alerts
Description: PWA dashboard and ntfy alert system for live monitoring of call campaigns.

Title: [EPIC] CI/CD & Code Quality
Description: GitHub Actions CI, branch protection, and code quality gates.

Title: [STORY] Regenerate OAuth Desktop Client
Description: The oauth_desktop_client_secret.json from the old repo is invalid for the new repo. Must regenerate before team can authenticate.

Title: [TASK] Go to GCP Credentials Console for commplex-493805
Description: Navigate to https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=commplex-493805

Title: [TASK] Create new OAuth client ID (Desktop app type)
Description: Application type: Desktop app. Name: CommPlex Dev Client.

Title: [TASK] Upload OAuth JSON to Secret Manager
Description: Run: gcloud secrets create OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET --data-file=oauth_desktop_client_secret.json --project=commplex-493805

Title: [SUBTASK] Delete local oauth_desktop_client_secret.json after upload
Parent: [TASK] Upload OAuth JSON to Secret Manager
Description: File is in .gitignore but delete locally after uploading to Secret Manager.

Title: [STORY] Grant Team GCP IAM Access
Description: Add Cynthia and Charles to GCP project with secretmanager.secretAccessor and run.invoker roles.

Title: [TASK] Add Cynthia to GCP IAM — secretmanager.secretAccessor
Description: gcloud projects add-iam-policy-binding commplex-493805 --member=user:CYNTHIA_EMAIL --role=roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor

Title: [TASK] Add Charles to GCP IAM — secretmanager.secretAccessor
Description: gcloud projects add-iam-policy-binding commplex-493805 --member=user:CHARLES_EMAIL --role=roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor

Title: [TASK] Run invite_team.sh to verify all access
Description: bash invite_team.sh — confirm all team members appear with correct roles.

Title: [STORY] Verify All Secrets in GCP Secret Manager
Description: Confirm all required secrets exist and have current values: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER, DATABASE_URL, OPENAI_API_KEY, NTFY_TOPIC, OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET

Title: [SUBTASK] Verify TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID exists in Secret Manager
Parent: [STORY] Verify All Secrets in GCP Secret Manager
Description: gcloud secrets list --project=commplex-493805 | grep TWILIO

Title: [SUBTASK] Verify DATABASE_URL exists and Cloud SQL is reachable
Parent: [STORY] Verify All Secrets in GCP Secret Manager
Description: Test connection from Cloud Run service

Title: [STORY] Run Live Wave Campaign — Production
Description: Execute first production wave campaign using real Twilio number. Confirm calls go out and ntfy alerts fire.

Title: [TASK] Confirm DRY_RUN=false in production .env
Description: grep DRY_RUN .env — should be false for production run

Title: [TASK] Select campaign to run first wave
Description: Choose from CommPlexCore/campaigns/ — likely mkz_leads or towncar_leads for immediate capital

Title: [TASK] Execute: python -m CommPlexCore.scripts.run_wave
Description: python -m CommPlexCore.scripts.run_wave --campaign <selected_campaign>

Title: [TASK] Monitor ntfy alert hub for confirmations
Description: Watch https://ntfy.sh/px10pro-commplex-z7x2-alert-hub for delivery receipts

Title: [SUBTASK] Confirm at least 1 outbound call connected
Description: Check Twilio console for call leg with status=completed

Title: [STORY] Test Serial Call Mode
Description: Verify serial mode works end-to-end with AI classification between calls.

Title: [TASK] Run serial with limit=1 in DRY_RUN mode
Description: DRY_RUN=true python -m CommPlexCore.scripts.run_serial --campaign test --limit 1

Title: [TASK] Run serial with limit=1 in live mode
Description: python -m CommPlexCore.scripts.run_serial --campaign <campaign> --limit 1

Title: [SUBTASK] Verify AI classification output appears in logs
Parent: [TASK] Run serial with limit=1 in live mode
Description: Check Cloud Run logs for classification results
